## Type of change

- [ ] New theme
- [ ] Theme update / bugfix
- [ ] SDK / build tooling
- [ ] Profile / game data
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] 'pnpm ci' passes locally (build + typecheck + validate)
- [ ] 'theme.json' id matches folder name
- [ ] 'theme.json' targetConsole/targetProfileId match directory path
- [ ] Theme added to 'index.json' (new themes only)
- [ ] Screenshots attached (new themes / visual changes)
- [ ] Tested with EmuLnk dev mode on device
